beIN SPORTS 6.original_title: Strasbourg vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 6.title: Strasbourg vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
beIN SPORTS 6.desc: The Ligue 1 head-to-head record between Strasbourg and Toulouse is perfectly balanced, with 28 wins each and 19 draws. Following their 1-0 defeat at the Stadium on 6 December, RCSA are looking to avoid consecutive league defeats against TFC for the first time since a three-game streak between August 2004 and September 2005. Strasbourg have won three of their last four Ligue 1 matches, as many as in their previous 14.
